title: oxymeris heterobasis
parts: Oxymeris heterobasis has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, leaves, and bark, which are used in traditional medicine. The roots of Oxymeris heterobasis contain medicinal constituents like alkaloids and glycosides, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The leaves of the plant are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been reported to possess antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The bark of Oxymeris heterobasis is also valued for its medicinal properties, containing compounds like tannins and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments.
side_effects: Oxymeris heterobasis can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high concentration of alkaloids. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can cause skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. In severe cases, using oxymeris heterobasis without proper knowledge and precautions can lead to liver damage, seizures, and even coma. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using oxymeris heterobasis for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
